Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Pursuant To Pitchess
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Continued To Apr-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian E. Soriano, Esq., appearing for Yulanda Williams who is not present. Amy D. Super, Esq., appearing for The City and County of San Francisco.

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY PURSUANT TO PITCHESS is before the Court today.

The Court informed the Plaintiff that the submitted affidavit needs more specific information for the Court to consider the motion before it. Mr. Soriano gave arguments. The Court finds that that the motion as it stands is not supportive enough to be granted. The Plaintiff requests to add a supplemental.

The Court allows Mr. Soriano a continuance to file a supplemental by Apr-4th and serve the City, and provide Courtesy Copies to the Court. Ms. Super has until Apr-18th to file Opposition for the City, and Mr. Soriano has until Apr-20th to file a reply.

The Court Continues this matter until Apr-25-2022 in Dept 514 at 09:00am.
Judge: Murlene J. Randal; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; FTR Recorded.
